title: "Be Wild & Free" Passport Holder - Sass & Belle Collection - Wanderlust Adventure
features: The "Be Wild & Free" Passport Holder is perfect for keep your money, passports, tickets & credit cards in organization when you are traveling. You can enjoy your trip without any concerns.

Lightweight and Slim Cover Case can hold your passport and Credit card and air ticket easily in hand. It has the credit card slots on the inside cover making it perfect to keep essentials when you need to find them in a rush.
Give your passport a make-over with this wonderful Pineapple print passport cover, featuring lovely orange & green details to the front and rear.
description: Give your passport a make-over with this wonderful Pineapple print passport cover, featuring lovely orange & green details to the front and rear. This lovely high quality passport cover is the perfect travel accessory for keeping your passport safe and stylish! Makes for a great gift for the keen traveller, or why not treat yourself! Approx dimensions - 14cm x 10cm (When Closed ) Designed to fit UK Passport, 20cm x 14cm (When Open)
